form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd on April 10 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Kattia beaten 5 lengths (26.58) in a Grade 5. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd on April 10 over 460m at Warragul behind Paw Kattia beaten 5 lengths (26.58) in a Grade 5. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warragul over 460m in 26.27 last start, beating Pepper Pie. In form and is right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warragul over 460m in 26.27 last start, beating Pepper Pie. In form and is right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a seventh over 450m at Ballarat. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a seventh over 450m at Ballarat. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 17 over 350m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 17 over 350m at Healesville in a Grade 5. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior went down fighting when second (26.24) over 460m at Warragul. Awkwardly drawn but is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior went down fighting when second (26.24) over 460m at Warragul. Awkwardly drawn but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (29.77) at this track over 515m. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and fell.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 450m at Warrnambool beaten 4.5 lengths (25.89) behind Laminate in a Grade 5 on April 16. Solid chance with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th over 450m at Warrnambool beaten 4.5 lengths (25.89) behind Laminate in a Grade 5 on April 16. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (30.07) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3.5 lengths third. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability and looks a key chance.
